title: Phazer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Phazer_crv.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] ''Phazer'' attacking the [[Habeen]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] technology transfer.]]
Two [[Nharwaak]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] from group '''''Phazer''''' took part in the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Conflict at Mylok IV]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The Nharwaak used ''Phazer'' group's corvettes during a last ditch effort to stop the transfer of completed advanced [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology from the neighboring [[Habeen]] species' [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Frigate]] ''[[Lendova]]'' to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

''The Lendova'' destroyed the heavily damaged ''Phazer 1'' with a volleys of [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] fire.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
